name: com.mcpqueen/registry
title: MCP Queen
description: The graded MCP registry: evidence-backed server grades from live probes. Search, verify, connect.

com.mcpqueen/differentiators.what: Grading index over the official MCP registry — verifies rather than lists
com.mcpqueen/differentiators.method: Live streamable-HTTP probes: initialize handshake, tools/list schema quality, latency, namespace provenance. Deterministic rubric (reachability 25 / protocol 15 / tooling 35 / latency 10 / provenance 15); every point stores the verbatim observation that earned it; auth-gated servers marked provisional, never guessed.
com.mcpqueen/differentiators.integrity: No stars, no votes, no pay-to-rank. Agent field reports are quarantined for human review and never affect grades.
